title: Feedback-Kern entdoppeln
goal: Zähllogik und Simulationsableitung im Feedback-Kern vereinheitlichen, ohne Verhalten zu ändern.

acceptance.assertion: OutcomeStatistics besitzt eine gemeinsame record-Logik für total, successes, failures und finite rewards.
propose_adjustment leitet failure_rate_after_sim über simulate_adjustment oder eine äquivalente einzige Simulationsquelle ab.
Tests belegen, dass Proposal-Evidence und simulate_adjustment für dasselbe Proposal konsistent bleiben.

metadata.outcome: Heimlern PR #186 deduplicated the feedback outcome counting and simulation path.

verified_acceptance.record-helper: crates/heimlern-feedback/src/lib.rs contains shared OutcomeStatistics::record logic for total, successes, failures and finite rewards.
verified_acceptance.single-simulation-source: propose_adjustment evidence derives failure_rate_after_sim from the same simulation source exposed by simulate_adjustment.
verified_acceptance.behavior-regression: PR #186 added regression coverage binding proposal evidence and simulate_adjustment consistency.

checks: local grep verification found OutcomeStatistics::record and simulation consistency tests on main
